summary: Soundboard capture with solid clarity showcases a brilliant performance highlighted by an epic 30‑minute Lovelight and strong early renditions of Easy Wind and High Time.
review: The recording is a clean soundboard source that delivers good clarity throughout, with no major technical flaws reported. Musically the show shines thanks to a monster 30‑minute Lovelight, lively early versions of Easy Wind and High Time, and the occasional quirky inclusion of New Orleans/Searchin'. The only blemish mentioned is a slightly forced vocal on Dire Wolf.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewers consistently give high star ratings (average ≈ 4.7) and praise both the performance (standout songs, strong playing) and the recording quality (good sound).

recording_quality.technical_notes: Good sound quality reported; no drop‑outs or major mix issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall brilliant set despite some tentative early Working Man's Dead era tunes; the long Lovelight serves as a high point, and the unusual song choices add extra interest.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Shows strong blues chops on Easy Wind; vocal performance noted as slightly forced on Dire Wolf.
band_member_comments.Keys: Organ vibrato on High Time praised.
